description: Output schema for on-demand slide visual design analysis (Phase 1 extraction + Phase 2 VLM annotation). Consumed by spec-composed strategy when adapting a sample slide's pattern for new content.

layoutFile.description: SlideLayout XML filename referenced by this slide (e.g. 'slideLayout5.xml')

patternDescription.description: One-line summary of the overall visual pattern (e.g. 'Horizontal 4-step process with numbered circles and descriptions')

spacingPattern.description: Consistent gap values (EMU) between elements. Only include gaps that appear consistently across multiple element pairs (e.g. {"columnGap": 91440, "rowGap": 45720, "sectionGap": 182880})

colorMapping.description: Map of semantic roles to theme color keys (accent1, dk1, etc.). Use theme color keys from $PROFILE, never hardcoded hex values (e.g. {"headerBackground": "accent1", "bodyText": "dk1", "dividerLine": "accent2"})

typographyMapping.description: Map of text roles to font properties observed in the slide. Optional — include when the slide establishes typography patterns beyond what the layout inherits.

elements.description: Every element from Phase 1 extraction, enriched with semantic annotations. All original structural fields (xfrm, fill, line, geometry, textBody, effects, zIndex, etc.) MUST be preserved as-is.

PatternStructure.description: Compositional structure of the design pattern — how elements relate to each other at the design-language level.

patternType.description: Visual pattern category. MUST use a value from pptx-profiler/schemas/enums.json#pattern_type. Use 'other' if none fits.
patternType.$comment: Enum values: timeline, fishbone, flowchart, matrix, comparison_cards, numbered_steps, org_chart, funnel, cycle, data_table, kpi_dashboard, icon_grid, text_columns, other

axis.description: Main axis or spine of the pattern, if one exists

element.description: Name of the element serving as the axis (e.g. 'Rectangle 5')

nodes.description: Element groups representing discrete steps, items, or data points along the axis

connectors.description: Elements that link nodes (arrows, lines, dotted paths)

hierarchy.description: Parent-child or nesting relationships beyond XML group shapes (e.g. category headers to sub-items)

AnnotatedElement.description: A slide element with all Phase 1 structural fields preserved plus Phase 2 semantic annotations. Phase 1 fields (id, name, elementType, zIndex, xfrm, fill, line, geometry, textBody, effects, isPlaceholder, placeholder, etc.) are pass-through — do not modify or omit them.

role.description: Semantic purpose of this element (e.g. 'slideTitle', 'columnHeader', 'dataCell', 'decorativeDivider', 'accentBar', 'backgroundShape', 'bulletList', 'captionText', 'stepIndicator'). Use descriptive names.

structuralRole.description: Role within the patternStructure. Suggested values: 'spine', 'node', 'branch', 'connector', 'nodeLabel', 'axisLabel', 'stepNumber', 'categoryHeader', 'dataPoint', 'decorativeFrame'. Null if not part of the pattern structure.
structuralRole.$comment: Not a strict enum — use the most descriptive value for the pattern.

relatedTo.description: Element ids or group names this element is semantically connected to. Empty array if standalone.

designIntent.description: 'fixed' = position/size must be preserved exactly when recreating the pattern. 'flexible' = can be adjusted for different content or item counts.

group.description: Logical unit grouping. Elements forming a visual unit (e.g. a card = background rect + title + body) share the same group name (e.g. 'card-1', 'step-2'). Null if the element is standalone.

AnnotatedElement.$comment: This definition only covers the Phase 2 annotation fields. All Phase 1 structural fields from extract_slide_elements.py output (id, name, elementType, zIndex, xfrm, fill, line, geometry, textBody, effects, isPlaceholder, placeholder, etc.) MUST be preserved alongside these annotations.
